heading: Use of best practices for capital asset projects and nuclear weapon life extension programs
label: 6286 Use of best practices for capital asset projects and nuclear weapon life extension programs
notes: References in TextThe date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2016 and the date of the enactment of such Act, referred to in text, is the date of enactment of , which was approved .Pub. L. 114–92Nov. 15, 2015

Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , which was set out as a note under , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 3117 of Pub. L. 114–92section 2754 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(18)

children.heading: .—Analyses of Alternatives
children.label: a .—Analyses of Alternatives
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the date of the enactment of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2016 (; ), the Secretary of Energy, in coordination with the Administrator, shall ensure that analyses of alternatives are conducted (including through contractors, as appropriate) in accordance with best practices for capital asset projects and life extension programs of the Administration and capital asset projects relating to defense environmental management.Public Law 114–92129 Stat. 726

children.heading: .—Cost Estimates
children.label: b .—Cost Estimates
children.text: Not later than 30 days after the date of the enactment of such Act, the Secretary, in coordination with the Administrator, shall develop cost estimates in accordance with cost estimating best practices for capital asset projects and life extension programs of the Administration and capital asset projects relating to defense environmental management.

children.heading: .—Revisions to Departmental Project Management Order and Nuclear Weapon Life Extension Requirements
children.label: c .—Revisions to Departmental Project Management Order and Nuclear Weapon Life Extension Requirements

children.text: the capital asset project management order of the Department of Energy to require the use of best practices for preparing cost estimates and for conducting analyses of alternatives for Administration and defense environmental management capital asset projects; and

the nuclear weapon life extension program procedures of the Department to require the use of best practices for preparing cost estimates and conducting analyses of alternatives for Administration life extension programs.
